name: healthcare_vendor_patch_silently_changes_mesa_auto_ben
premise: PACU is holding ventilated patients while a generator test failed; biorepository telemetry is creeping toward out-of-spec. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare vendor patch silently changes mesa auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Keisha Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Keisha Ibrahim, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Chen
agents.identity: I am Keisha Chen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Ibrahim must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Keisha Ibrahim do?
